title: POST /books endpoint with full parameters
evidence: src/books_api/core.clj:14, src/books_api/handlers.clj:26-37 implements creation with title, author, year, isbn

title: GET /books with ?author= filter support
evidence: src/books_api/handlers.clj:21-24 implements list_books_handler with author parameter, db.clj:29-38 implements get_all_books with optional filter

title: PUT /books/{id} update endpoint
evidence: src/books_api/core.clj:16, handlers.clj:46-60 implements update_book_handler with validation

title: SQLite database storage
evidence: db.clj:5 defines db-spec with sqlite, init-db! creates books table

title: JSON responses with correct HTTP status codes
evidence: handlers.clj:6-9 json-response helper, all handlers return status codes (200, 201, 204, 400, 404)

title: Input validation requiring title and author
evidence: handlers.clj:11-16 validate-book checks for title and author presence, used in create and update handlers

title: GET /health endpoint
evidence: handlers.clj:18-19, core.clj:12 implements health check returning {'status': 'ok'}

title: README.md with setup and run instructions
evidence: README.md exists with detailed prerequisites, setup, running, and API reference sections

title: Unit/integration tests (minimum 3 required)
evidence: test/books_api/core_test.clj contains 6 deftest functions: health-check-test, create-book-test, list-books-test, get-book-test, update-book-test, delete-book-test covering 24 assertions

title: Comprehensive test coverage beyond requirement
evidence: 6 test functions with 24 assertions exceeds '3+ tests' requirement, including edge cases (404s, validation errors)
